verified.name: Wiktionary
verified.tagline: Query the crowd-built dictionary through MediaWiki's action API
verified.description: The English Wiktionary is served by the same MediaWiki action API that powers Wikipedia, so you can pull definitions, etymologies and translations as structured JSON. Ask for the extract, wikitext, or any prop you like via query parameters. No key, no signup — just the standard MediaWiki endpoint.

4803.title: hello
4803.extract:
English

... Alternative forms: hullo (UK) ... First attested in 1826. (HTML trimmed)

verified.rateLimit: No hard published cap; Wikimedia User-Agent policy and request-etiquette apply
verified.notes: Same api.php surface as Wikipedia; extracts are HTML fragments.

verified.name: Disify
verified.tagline: Flag disposable and throwaway email addresses in one GET
verified.description: Disify checks an email address or domain and tells you whether it is disposable, whether the domain has valid DNS/MX records, and a confidence score with the signals behind it. Handy for filtering burner addresses out of signup flows. Just append the address to the path and read the JSON.

verified.name: Kickbox
verified.description: Kickbox exposes a free open endpoint that answers a single yes/no question: is this address on a known disposable/temporary email domain? Pass any email and get back a tiny JSON boolean. It is a subset of Kickbox's paid verification suite, but this check needs no account.
verified.notes: Only the disposable-domain check is keyless; full email verification is a separate paid product.

verified.name: mail.tm
verified.tagline: Spin up throwaway inboxes over a JSON:LD REST API
verified.description: mail.tm is a temporary-email service with a clean REST API for creating disposable mailboxes and reading messages. The /domains endpoint lists which mail domains are currently available to register against, and it needs no authentication. Responses come back as Hydra/JSON-LD collections.
verified.rateLimit: Rate limited (429 on exceed); exact policy per docs.mail.tm
verified.notes: Creating/reading a mailbox needs an account+token; /domains is the keyless read.

verified.name: JokeAPI
verified.tagline: Filterable jokes with a safe-mode switch and NSFW flags
verified.description: JokeAPI serves single-line or two-part jokes across categories, with query flags to blacklist nsfw/racist/sexist/etc. content or force a clean safe-mode. Every response carries the flags so you know exactly what you got. No key required.

sampleJson.joke: "We messed up the keming again guys."

verified.notes: Content can be offensive/NSFW without safe-mode or blacklist flags; sample used safe-mode.

verified.name: Corporate Buzz Words
verified.tagline: Generate one fresh corporate buzz-phrase per request
verified.description: A tiny open-source generator that returns a single randomly assembled slice of corporate jargon, like "Credibly Engage Transparent Technology". Great for placeholder copy, mission-statement gags, or seeding demos. One GET, one phrase.

verified.name: PotterDB
verified.tagline: Harry Potter characters, spells and potions as JSON:API
verified.description: PotterDB is an open database of the Harry Potter universe — characters, spells, potions, books and movies — served over a paginated JSON:API. Each character record carries house, species, blood status, wands and more. No key needed; page through with page[size] and page[number].
verified.dataLicense: Unverified (data derived from Harry Potter Fandom, CC BY-SA)

verified.name: Open Brewery DB
verified.tagline: Search breweries, brewpubs and bottle shops worldwide
verified.description: Open Brewery DB is a free directory of breweries, cideries and craft-beer bottle shops with names, types, addresses and geo-coordinates. Filter by city, state, type or name, or page through the whole set. No authentication required.

verified.name: CheapShark
verified.tagline: Live PC-game deals and prices across digital stores
verified.description: CheapShark aggregates current sale prices for PC/Steam games across dozens of storefronts and exposes them as JSON. The /deals feed returns titles with sale vs. normal price, savings percentage, store and Steam IDs, and Metacritic/Steam ratings. Keyless and CORS-friendly.

verified.name: Foodish
verified.tagline: One random food photo URL per call
verified.description: Foodish returns the URL of a random food photograph — pizza, dosa, biryani and more — as a one-key JSON object. It is an open-source project meant for placeholders, demos and food-themed toys. Hit the endpoint, get an image link.

verified.name: SEC EDGAR Data
verified.tagline: Public-company filings and facts straight from the SEC
verified.description: The SEC's EDGAR data API serves filing histories and company facts for every US public company as JSON, keyed by CIK. The submissions endpoint returns a company's identity, tickers, exchanges and recent filings. It is US-government public data; the SEC requires a descriptive User-Agent and rate-limits fair use.
verified.rateLimit: Max 10 requests/second; descriptive User-Agent required (SEC fair-access policy)
verified.notes: CIK must be zero-padded to 10 digits in the path.

verified.name: justmeme.wtf
verified.tagline: Meme templates: browse, search, trend and randomize
verified.description: justmeme.wtf offers a keyless JSON API over a large library of meme templates, with endpoints for listing, searching, trending, categories and a random pick. Each template comes back with a name, slug and image URL. CORS is open and no signup is needed.

verified.name: IBANforge
verified.tagline: IBAN validation and BIC lookup with a free keyless demo
verified.description: IBANforge validates IBANs and looks up BIC/SWIFT codes across dozens of countries, backed by 121K+ BIC entries. The keyless /v1/demo endpoint returns worked examples showing the full validation shape (country, check digits, BBAN, SEPA reachability, BIC). Live queries need a free API key or an x402/USDC micropayment.

sampleJson.message: Demo — these results are free. Use POST /v1/iban/validate ... for your own queries.

verified.freeTier: 200 requests/month with a free API key; /v1/demo and /health are keyless
verified.notes: Only /v1/demo and /health are keyless; validate/BIC endpoints return 402 without an API key or x402 USDC payment. Response ACAO is pinned to the vendor's own origin (not shipapis).

verified.name: Astroworld
verified.tagline: Minecraft game data: mobs, items, biomes, versions and more
verified.description: Astroworld is a keyless REST API of Minecraft reference data — mobs, items, biomes, enchantments, structures, commands, versions and achievements. Mob records include HP, per-difficulty damage, drops, spawn conditions and behaviour notes. Filter with search/type/category params and add ?pretty=true for formatted output.

verified.name: Barter.VG
verified.tagline: Game, DLC, bundle and giveaway data for trading
verified.description: Barter.vg is a game-trading tracker whose pages expose JSON by appending /json to routes — user libraries and wishlists, item lookups, bundles and giveaways. The Steam-app lookup returns a game's trade stats: how many users have it tradable, wishlisted or in-library, plus pricing and release info. No key required.
verified.notes: The generic /browse/json feed returned HTTP 500; the /steam/app/{id}/json lookup is reliable.

verified.name: Cross Universe
verified.tagline: Card data for the fan-made Cross Universe TCG
verified.description: Cross Universe is a free fan-made trading card game, and this API returns full card data as JSON by card ID and language. Each record includes name, level, card type, attack/defense, types and structured effect text. Keyless with open CORS; the base path also serves card images.
verified.notes: Docs URL from the listing (crossuniverse.psychpsyo.com) now redirects to crossuniverse.net.

skipped.name: Thunder Client
skipped.reason: Not a hosted HTTP API — it is a VS Code REST-client / API-testing extension, so there is no endpoint to probe.

skipped.name: mail.gw
skipped.reason: Endpoint https://api.mail.gw/domains returned HTTP 502 (Bad Gateway) on all 3 attempts; service appears down.

skipped.name: Fun Fact
skipped.reason: Responds with an HTML JavaScript redirect (Joken JWT bot-challenge) instead of JSON; no keyless JSON GET is reachable via curl.

skipped.name: Econdb
skipped.reason: All data endpoints return HTTP 401 'Authentication credentials were not provided' — requires an API token.

skipped.name: Helium
skipped.reason: MCP server only (heliumtrades.com); no keyless REST JSON GET endpoint, and the free tier is gated to 50 queries via the MCP protocol.

skipped.name: Portfolio Optimizer
skipped.reason: Optimization endpoints require POST with a JSON body; no keyless GET returns data (API root responds 403 Forbidden).

skipped.name: BaconMockup
skipped.reason: Serves placeholder JPEG images (content-type image/jpeg), not JSON.

skipped.name: Autochess VNG
skipped.reason: Self-host-only project (npm run dev); no live hosted API instance to probe.
